title: WigWag Art & Music Festival
location: Avondale Estates Arts District, Washington St, Avondale Estates, GA
description: The 5th annual WigWag Art & Music Festival fills the Avondale Estates Arts District with live music, local art vendors, food trucks, and community vibes. Headlined by Blair Crimmins and the Hookers. Free to attend — bring a date, grab a drink, and explore the arts scene. VIP tickets include drinks, snacks, a limited edition screen-printed poster, t-shirt, and indoor restroom access.

title: Comedy & Candles Rooftop Night: Love In The Dark
location: REVERB Hotel Rooftop, 770 NE Atlanta Ave, Atlanta, GA 30306
description: Stand-up comedy under the stars on the REVERB Hotel rooftop, paired with candle making. Presented by HYPERS CLUB — intimate, fun, and genuinely romantic. Great for couples who want something different from the typical bar date. Tickets sell out; grab them early.

title: SALSAtlanta Bachata Nights
location: Academy Ballroom ATL, 800 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta, GA 30324
description: Smooth, sensual bachata at Atlanta's premier Latin dance venue. Beginner-friendly with instructors on hand. Great vibe, great music, and a short walk from Virginia-Highland for post-dance drinks. Perfect for couples wanting to learn a new dance together.

title: Hissy Fit Comedy Night
location: Wild Heaven Beer, 120B Ottley Dr SE, Atlanta, GA 30316
description: Catch some of Atlanta's best comics at Wild Heaven Beer in East Atlanta. Presented by Hissy Fit Comedy and West End Comedy Fest. Affordable, fun, and the brewery has excellent craft beer. 18+ show. Great low-key Friday night date.

title: Euro Atlanta — I Love Reggae Fridays
location: Euro Atl, 1265 Powers Ferry Rd, Marietta, GA 30067
description: Reggae, Dancehall, Soca, and AfroBeats all night at Euro Atlanta. Free entry, free parking, and incredible Jamaican food — oxtails that fall off the bone, snapper that snaps. Great drinks, great vibes, and no cover charge. One of Atlanta's most reliable free date nights.

title: BAILAtlanta — Cuban Dance Weekend
location: Academy Ballroom ATL, 800 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta, GA 30324
description: Atlanta's premier Cuban salsa and dance weekend returns with 14 dance workshops, 4 DJs, 7 professional instructors, multiple parties, and live dance performances. May 15-17. Whether you're seasoned dancers or curious beginners, the atmosphere is vibrant, welcoming, and date-perfect. Register ahead.

title: Breakaway Music Festival Atlanta
location: Center Parc Stadium, 501 Capitol Ave SW, Atlanta, GA 30315
description: Atlanta's biggest EDM festival returns to Center Parc Stadium with headliners John Summit, Kaskade, FISHER, and Mau P. Electronic music, food vendors, and a high-energy atmosphere. Great for couples who love to dance and want an all-day festival experience. GA, Floor, and VIP options available.

title: Breakaway Music Festival Atlanta — Day 2
location: Center Parc Stadium, 501 Capitol Ave SW, Atlanta, GA 30315
description: Second day of Breakaway Festival with the same headliners. Electronic music festival at Center Parc Stadium — great energy, outdoor setting, and dancing all day. Bring your partner, grab a drink, and lose yourselves in the music. VIP tiers include shaded lounges and fast bar access.

title: Euro Atlanta — I Love Reggae Fridays
location: Euro Atl, 1265 Powers Ferry Rd, Marietta, GA 30067
description: Reggae, Dancehall, Soca, and AfroBeats all night at Euro Atlanta. Free entry, free parking, and incredible Jamaican food — oxtails that fall off the bone, snapper that snaps. Great drinks, great vibes, and no cover charge. One of Atlanta's most reliable free date nights.
